task_completion.description: Log in to the system as admin
task_completion.visual_evidence: The NOSH EMR dashboard is visible, indicating a successful login, ideally showing the user logged in as 'admin'.

task_completion.description: Navigate to the scheduling or calendar interface
task_completion.visual_evidence: The calendar or schedule view is open in the main application window.
The provider dropdown or schedule header clearly shows 'James Carter' or 'Dr. James Carter' as the active provider being viewed.

task_completion.description: Select the 1:00 PM to 2:00 PM time slot for today
task_completion.visual_evidence: The time slot starting at 1:00 PM (or 13:00) and ending at 2:00 PM (or 14:00) is clicked or highlighted on the calendar for the current day.

task_completion.description: Configure the block as a non-patient event
task_completion.visual_evidence: The event creation dialog is open and indicates it is a non-patient event (e.g., a 'Provider Event', 'Block Time' option is selected, or the patient search/selection field is left empty).

task_completion.description: Enter the reason 'Staff Meeting' and save the blocked schedule
task_completion.visual_evidence: The text 'Staff Meeting' is typed into the reason/description field of the event dialog, or the final calendar view shows a blocked time slot from 1:00 PM to 2:00 PM labeled 'Staff Meeting'.

integrity.description: The agent used the web browser GUI to complete the task
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show interaction with the NOSH web interface (clicking buttons, filling forms) rather than executing database queries or curl commands in a terminal.

integrity.description: The agent interacted with the actual scheduling application
integrity.visual_evidence: The event details are entered into the genuine NOSH EMR scheduling modal/dialog, not typed into a separate text editor or notepad.

integrity.description: The agent did not use browser developer tools to fake the visual outcome
integrity.visual_evidence: The browser developer tools (Inspect Element) are not open, and the blocked schedule appears as a native element of the application's calendar interface.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Target Provider: Dr. James Carter. Target Time: Today, 1:00 PM to 2:00 PM (13:00 to 14:00). Target Reason: 'Staff Meeting' (case-insensitive check for 'staff' and 'meeting'). Event Type: Non-patient event (no patient should be associated with this block).
